title: The Debate over the Chronology of the Iron Age in the Southern Levant (in: The Bible and Radiocarbon Dating, eds. T. E. Levy & T. Higham)
author: Amihai Mazar
allowedUseNotes: Copyrighted chapter. Summaries in project's own words only.
summary: Statement of the 'modified conventional chronology' and survey of the high/low chronology debate that governs absolute dating of early-monarchy strata. Anchor for the project's refusal to hard-date disputed material.
confidenceNotes: Card seeded from team knowledge; exact chapter pagination to verify (M1).
